[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1110101110 7
2 1000101010 4
3 0001011100 4
4 1110001111 7
5 0001001001 3
6 0010001010 3
7 1111011100 7
